---
title: "Effects of a two-week BMAA practice on emotion regulation among university students"
lang: en
language: ../../assets/language-en.yml
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Method

A pretest-posttest waitlist-control study with university and graduate students. The experimental group received a two-week, nine-hour short-form BMAA practice.

## Key Findings

- BMAA-S reduced depressive symptoms and emotion-regulation difficulties and improved self-reported emotion regulation.
- Improved body awareness mediated reductions in depression and partially mediated emotion-regulation improvement.

## Reference

許惟智. (2020). *探討兩週身心中軸覺察練習對大學生情緒調節的成效及覺察傾向、工作記憶的中介角色* [碩士論文，國立臺灣大學]. https://doi.org/10.6342/NTU202002076
